title: Iran submarine cable fees
snippet: Iran threatens to charge tech companies for 7 submarine internet cables beneath Strait of Hormuz. Cables carry ~20% of global data traffic, facilitate $10 trillion in daily financial transactions. IRGC demands initial licensing fees, annual "protection" payments from Meta/Amazon/Microsoft, exclusive Iranian control over maintenance. Experts say this is more threat than viable plan, violates UNCLOS Article 79.
tag_reason: 5/17 신규 — 이란이 디지털 인프라로 위협 확장, 석유 넘어 데이터 인질화
